item.title: Why we have inflated expectations, 6 feet 7 inches
item.description: This is so true In the 1990s, a “middle-class job” was enough to buy a house. Being “6 feet” was enough to be tall. In the 2020s, the middle has been ho
item.content:
This is so true
> In the 1990s, a “middle-class job” was enough to buy a house. Being “6 feet” was enough to be tall. > > In the 2020s, the middle has been hollowed out. > > To be “wealthy” now requires a crypto-exit or a tech IPO (The Economic 6’7”). > > To be “famous” requires global virality (The Social 6’7”). > > To be “attractive” requires filters and surgery (The Aesthetic 6’7”).
